description: Elyos AI provides autonomous AI agents for trades and field services, automating communications, booking, dispatch, and follow-ups.

build_patterns.name: Agentic Architectures
evidence: AI Agents
Out-of-hours AI Agent
Daytime Customer Service Rep
AI Sales Executive
Appointment Confirmation Agent
Scheduling Assistant
Field Engineer Assistant
A fully autonomous customer service rep
Your AI Agent is always on
Listen to a call
Our customers and service desk staff love Jamie (our AI Agent)! He is handling over 500 calls daily, helping us to triage and diagnose and deal with niche customer issues.
build_patterns.description: Elyos AI implements agentic architectures by deploying multiple autonomous AI agents tailored for specific business functions (customer service, sales, scheduling, field operations). These agents interact with users, perform multi-step reasoning, and automate operational tasks.

build_patterns.name: Vertical Data Moats
evidence: AI, built for trades and field services
AI built specifically for trades and field services
AI is making already great trades businesses, unstoppable.
Industry-specific use cases: Gas & Electricity, Plumbing, Installers, Fire & Security, Home Services, Housing Associations
Trained AI Sales Executives to help you scale
build_patterns.description: Elyos AI leverages proprietary, industry-specific data from trades and field services to train and optimize their agents, creating a competitive advantage through domain expertise and tailored solutions.

build_patterns.name: Micro-model Meshes
evidence: Multiple specialized agents for different tasks (customer service, sales, scheduling, field engineering)
Each agent described as having a specific function and expertise
build_patterns.description: Rather than a single monolithic model, Elyos AI appears to use a mesh of specialized models/agents for distinct operational roles, enabling task-specific optimization and performance.

build_patterns.name: Continuous-learning Flywheels
evidence: Customer Insights: Understand your customers better and improve your service with the AI powered Elyos insights
Our Agent performance: Elyos AI Agents transform businesses. Experience increased efficiency, more job bookings and improved customer service.
Success stories and feedback from customers about agent performance
build_patterns.description: There are indications that Elyos AI collects operational feedback and customer insights to improve agent performance and customer satisfaction, suggesting some form of feedback loop and continuous improvement.

sub_vertical: field services automation for trades (e.g., plumbing, electrical, fire & security, property maintenance)

signals: Product appears to be used by real customers in production environments (testimonials, case studies).
Raised significant venture funding, indicating engineering hiring and investment.

unique_findings: Elyos AI is building a suite of specialized AI agents targeted at trades and field services (e.g., Out-of-hours AI Agent, Field Engineer Assistant, Appointment Confirmation Agent), which is a vertical not typically prioritized by mainstream AI agent platforms.

The agents are positioned as fully autonomous, handling high-volume, real-time phone and scheduling interactions (e.g., >500 calls/day for a single customer), suggesting robust telephony integration and possibly custom NLP pipelines for domain-specific dialog management.

There is an emphasis on deep integration with job booking and scheduling platforms, promising 'always optimized' bookings and automated PPM (planned preventative maintenance) scheduling, which implies non-trivial orchestration between AI, legacy systems, and real-world constraints.
The company claims >96% customer satisfaction and >80% lead conversion, which—if accurate—suggests strong tuning for user experience and business outcomes, not just technical feasibility.

The concept of a 'CHM' (Communication History Management) as a CRM alternative hints at a novel architecture for aggregating and reasoning over multi-modal customer interactions, potentially defensible if implemented with proprietary data structures or retrieval-augmented generation.

story_angles.headline: Agentic Architectures: How Elyos AI Built Specialized Agents for Trades, Not Just Chatbots
story_angles.summary: Elyos AI has engineered a suite of agentic architectures tailored for field services and trades, moving beyond generic LLM-powered chatbots. Their modular approach enables distinct agents for customer service, scheduling, and field operations, each optimized for real-world workflows rather than generic conversation.
evidence: Distinct agents for out-of-hours calls, sales, scheduling, and field engineering
Continuous-learning flywheels and micro-model mesh patterns mentioned in build context

story_angles.headline: Vertical Data Moats: How Elyos AI Leverages Proprietary Trades Data for Unbeatable Performance
story_angles.summary: Elyos AI's competitive edge comes from its deep integration with vertical-specific data in trades and field services. By capturing and learning from operational data—call logs, appointment outcomes, and engineering notes—they build micro-models that outperform generic AI solutions in accuracy and reliability.
evidence: Integration with job booking platforms and automated recording of client interactions
Customer testimonials citing improved booking rates and reduced no-access incidents

story_angles.headline: Built by Trades, for Trades: Elyos AI’s Deep Domain Expertise Sets It Apart
story_angles.summary: Unlike horizontal AI platforms, Elyos AI is laser-focused on the operational realities of trades and field services. Their agents are designed with direct input from industry experts, resulting in solutions that engineers and managers actually want to use—reflected in rapid adoption and high satisfaction scores.
evidence: Success stories from GasCare, Custom Heat, and Amax Fire & Security highlighting domain-specific benefits
>96% customer satisfaction after AI agent interactions

story_angles.headline: Why Elyos AI Ditched the CRM: Betting on Communication History Management Instead
story_angles.summary: Elyos AI challenges the industry’s reliance on traditional CRMs by introducing the concept of Communication History Management (CHM). This contrarian bet reflects their belief that actionable, context-rich communication data is more valuable for trades businesses than static customer records.
evidence: Blog post: 'The CRM of the future isn't a CRM... it’s a CHM'
Emphasis on automated call recording and real-time operational insights

anti_patterns.description: There is no clear evidence of proprietary models or technology; the product appears to be a thin integration layer over LLM APIs, with no mention of custom model development or unique ML approaches.
evidence: No mention of proprietary LLMs or unique AI architectures.
No technical details on model training, data pipelines, or agentic innovations.
Product descriptions focus on workflow automation and integrations, not on core AI capabilities.

anti_patterns.description: The offering could be absorbed by vertical SaaS incumbents or CRM platforms as a feature. The 'AI agent' functions (scheduling, reminders, call handling) are narrow and could be replicated by others.
evidence: Core features are call handling, scheduling, reminders—functions that are easily added to existing platforms.
No evidence of a broader platform or ecosystem play.
Heavy reliance on integrations with existing job booking platforms.

anti_patterns.description: There is no clear data or technical moat. The company does not articulate unique access to data, proprietary models, or defensible technology.
evidence: No mention of unique datasets, vertical data moats, or continuous learning flywheels.
Marketing focuses on outcomes (efficiency, bookings) but not on how these are uniquely achieved.
Success stories and testimonials do not reference technical differentiation.

anti_patterns.description: Marketing is heavy on AI buzzwords ('unstoppable', 'never miss a call', 'fully autonomous') without technical substantiation or transparency.
evidence: Repeated claims of 'AI-powered' and 'autonomous' without technical detail.
No published benchmarks, model cards, or technical whitepapers.
Customer testimonials focus on business outcomes, not AI capabilities.

anti_patterns.description: The market for AI-powered customer service and field service automation is crowded, with no clear unique angle or positioning.
evidence: Many competitors offer similar AI agent solutions for scheduling, reminders, and call handling.
No clear evidence of vertical-specific innovation beyond workflow integration.
Positioning is generic ('AI for trades and field services') without a unique technical or business insight.

competitors.name: ServiceM8
competitors.similarity: Both provide software for trades and field service businesses, including job booking, scheduling, and customer communication automation.
competitors.how_different: Elyos AI focuses on autonomous AI agents that handle real-time customer interactions (calls, scheduling, sales) with generative AI, whereas ServiceM8 is more of a workflow/job management platform with limited AI automation.

competitors.name: Jobber
competitors.similarity: Jobber and Elyos AI both serve field service and trades businesses, offering tools for scheduling, dispatch, and customer management.
competitors.how_different: Jobber is a comprehensive field service management platform with some automation, but Elyos AI positions itself as providing fully autonomous AI agents that replace or augment human customer service and sales reps.

competitors.name: Zendesk AI
competitors.similarity: Both offer AI-powered customer service automation, including chatbots and ticket triage.
competitors.how_different: Zendesk AI is a horizontal solution for any industry, focused on digital channels (chat, email). Elyos AI is verticalized for trades/field services, handling phone calls, scheduling, and field-specific workflows.

competitors.name: Intercom Fin AI
competitors.similarity: Both provide AI agents for customer support and sales automation.
competitors.how_different: Intercom is horizontal and digital-first (web, chat), while Elyos AI is verticalized for trades, with deep integration into field service workflows and phone-based interactions.

competitors.name: Slingshot (WorkWave)
competitors.similarity: Slingshot offers outsourced and AI-powered call answering and lead response for field service businesses.
competitors.how_different: Elyos AI replaces outsourced call centers with AI agents, promising better integration, 24/7 availability, and vertical-specific workflows.

differentiation.primary: Elyos AI delivers vertical-specific, fully autonomous AI agents for trades and field services, automating both customer-facing and back-office workflows (calls, scheduling, sales, field engineer support).
differentiation.technical: Their AI agents are trained specifically for trades/field services, handle real-time phone calls, integrate deeply with job booking platforms, and automate complex workflows (not just chat). They claim >96% customer satisfaction and >80% lead-to-job conversion.
differentiation.business: They target SMBs and mid-market trades/field service companies, replacing outsourced call centers and admin with AI agents. Their GTM is vertical-focused, with case studies and community building in trades.
differentiation.positioning: They position as 'the only AI agents you'll want on your team' and emphasize being built 'for trades and field services,' in contrast to generic AI or CRM solutions.

secret_sauce.core_advantage: Deep verticalization: AI agents purpose-built for trades and field services, handling phone, scheduling, sales, and field engineer workflows end-to-end.
secret_sauce.defensibility: Requires domain-specific data, integrations with job booking/dispatch systems, and nuanced understanding of field service workflows. Their customer success stories and high satisfaction metrics suggest effective tuning.
evidence: "AI built specifically for trades and field services. Join our community."
"Fully integrated with your job booking platform, no more time wasted on admin"
"Our AI Agents give us the benefit of flexibility and scale, especially if you want to grow fast."
Customer testimonials from GasCare, Custom Heat, Amax Fire & Security, H2 Property Services
Metrics: >96% customer satisfaction, >80% leads convert to jobs, >30% cost reduction

competitive_analysis.moat_explanation: Their defensibility comes from vertical focus, domain-specific AI tuning, and integrations with field service platforms. While horizontal AI providers could enter, Elyos AI's workflow depth, customer base, and operational expertise in trades create switching costs and learning curve for new entrants. However, moat is not 'high' because large horizontal AI/CRM players could build or buy similar capabilities.

handling over 500 calls daily, helping us to triage and diagnose and deal with niche customer issues

AI built specifically for trades and field services

Highly granular agent specialization for field service verticals (e.g., Out-of-hours agent, Appointment Reminder agent, Field Engineer assistant) with direct integration into operational workflows and customer-facing tasks.
Emphasis on replacing traditional CRM with a 'Communication History Management system (CHM)', indicating a shift in data architecture for customer interaction records.
